expectations.text: Checks if pnpm is installed or offers to install it
expectations.evidence: Step 2: checks node --version and pnpm --version, offers install if missing

expectations.text: Asks user for their Anthropic API key
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'Do you already have an Anthropic API key, or do you need help getting one?'

expectations.text: Does not echo API key to terminal output
expectations.evidence: Step 4 tells user to 'replace your-key-here with your actual Anthropic API key' — implies manual edit, doesn't use Edit tool to protect the key
Step 6 only EXPLAINS how to start services, does not actually start them. Says 'I would NOT start the dev servers automatically'
Same as above — only explains, does not start

expectations.text: Presents both localhost:3000 and localhost:5173 URLs
expectations.evidence: Step 6 mentions both http://localhost:3000 and http://localhost:5173

expectations.text: Follows correct order: install -> env config -> start services
expectations.evidence: Steps follow logical order, even though services aren't actually started
